description: Fix Kami turn log markers: '--- Turno Kami ---' must appear BEFORE any sanctuary resolution logs, and '--- Fin Turno Kami ---' after all resolutions. Currently, empty temple 'saltado' logs appear before the marker.
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts around line 3590-3660 (the kami resolution setup in advancePlayer), the empty temples' 'saltado' log messages are added at lines 3601-3604 BEFORE the '--- Turno Kami ---' marker at line 3659. Fix: Move the '--- Turno Kami ---' marker to be added BEFORE the loop that logs empty temples (before the `for (const temple of sortedTemples)` loop that starts around line 3592).
Verify that the resolveKamiTurn function (line ~1668) also adds the marker before any temple logs - it currently does this correctly at line 1673.
Ensure order is: '--- Turno Kami ---', then empty temple logs ('Santuario N (...) - sin figuras, saltado'), then temple resolution logs, then '--- Fin Turno Kami ---'.
acceptance_criteria: The log line '--- Turno Kami ---' appears before ALL sanctuary resolution entries including 'saltado' entries
The log line '--- Fin Turno Kami ---' appears after ALL sanctuary resolutions are complete
TypeScript build passes with no errors
findings: npm install was needed before build could run. Build passes cleanly after fix.
